id.description: The latest ID for the specific assessment task.

applicationPreferences.description: The transformation preferences for non-database applications.

databasePreferences.description: The transformation preferences for database applications.

prioritizeBusinessGoals.description: The rank of business goals based on priority.

managementPreference.description: Application preferences that you specify to prefer managed environment.

awsManagedResources.description: Indicates interest in solutions that are managed by AWS.

targetDestination.description: The choice of application destination that you specify.
The choice of application destination that you specify.

selfManageResources.description: Indicates interest in managing your own resources on AWS.

assessmentSummary.description: An assessment summary for the portfolio including the number of servers to rehost and the overall number of anti-patterns.

antipatternReportS3Object.description: The Amazon S3 object containing the anti-pattern report.

antipatternReportStatus.description: The status of the anti-pattern report.

antipatternReportStatusMessage.description: The status message of the anti-pattern report.

lastAnalyzedTimestamp.description: The time the assessment was performed.

listApplicationComponentStatusSummary.description: List of status summaries of the analyzed application components.

listServerStatusSummary.description: List of status summaries of the analyzed servers.

analyzableServers.description: The list of analyzable servers with summary information about each server.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

hostname.description: The host name of the analyzable server.

ipAddress.description: The ip address of the analyzable server.

source.description: The data source of the analyzable server.

vmId.description: The virtual machine id of the analyzable server.

applicationComponentInfos.description: The list of application components with detailed information about each component.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

analysisStatus.description: The status of analysis, if the application component has source code or an associated database.

antipatternReportS3Object.description: The S3 bucket name and the Amazon S3 key name for the anti-pattern report.

antipatternReportStatus.description: The status of the anti-pattern report generation.

antipatternReportStatusMessage.description: The status message for the anti-pattern.

appUnitError.description: The error in the analysis of the source code or database.

associatedServerId.description: The ID of the server that the application component is running on.

databaseConfigDetail.description: Configuration details for the database associated with the application component.

secretName.description: AWS Secrets Manager key that holds the credentials that you use to connect to a database.

id.description: The ID of the application component.

inclusionStatus.description: Indicates whether the application component has been included for server recommendation or not.

lastAnalyzedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the application component was assessed.

listAntipatternSeveritySummary.description: A list of anti-pattern severity summaries.

moreServerAssociationExists.description: Set to true if the application component is running on multiple servers.

recommendationSet.description: The top recommendation set for the application component.

possible_values: Amazon Relational Database Service on MySQL
Amazon Relational Database Service on PostgreSQL

transformationTool.description: The target destination for the recommendation set.

runtimeStatusMessage.description: The status message for the application unit.

sourceCodeRepositories.description: Details about the source code repository associated with the application component.

statusMessage.description: A detailed description of the analysis status and any failure message.

Collectors.description: The list of all the installed collectors.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

collectorHealth.description: Indicates the health of a collector.

collectorVersion.description: Current version of the collector that is running in the environment that you specify.

remoteSourceCodeAnalysisServerInfo.description: Info about the remote server source code configuration.

remoteSourceCodeAnalysisServerConfigurat.description: The time when the remote source code server was configured.

versionControlInfoList.description: The list of the version control configurations.

hostName.description: Hostname of the server that is hosting the collector.

ipAddress.description: IP address of the server that is hosting the collector.

lastActivityTimeStamp.description: Time when the collector last pinged the service.

registeredTimeStamp.description: Time when the collector registered with the service.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

taskInfos.description: Lists information about the files you import.

completionTime.description: The time that the import task completes.

id.description: The ID of the import file task.

importName.description: The name of the import task given in StartImportFileTask.

inputS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where the import file is located.

inputS3Key.description: The Amazon S3 key name of the import file.

numberOfRecordsFailed.description: The number of records that failed to be imported.

numberOfRecordsSuccess.description: The number of records successfully imported.

startTime.description: Start time of the import task.

statusReportS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket name for status report of import task.

statusReportS3Key.description: The Amazon S3 key name for status report of import task. The report contains details about whether each record imported successfully or why it did not.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

serverInfos.description: The list of servers with detailed information about each server.

antipatternReportS3Object.description: The S3 bucket name and Amazon S3 key name for anti-pattern report.

antipatternReportStatus.description: The status of the anti-pattern report generation.

antipatternReportStatusMessage.description: A message about the status of the anti-pattern report generation.

dataCollectionStatus.description: The status of assessment for the server.

lastAnalyzedTimestamp.description: The timestamp of when the server was assessed.

listAntipatternSeveritySummary.description: A list of anti-pattern severity summaries.

possible_values: Amazon Relational Database Service on MySQL
Amazon Relational Database Service on PostgreSQL

transformationTool.description: The target destination for the recommendation set.

statusMessage.description: A message about the status of data collection, which contains detailed descriptions of any error messages.

cpuArchitecture.description: CPU architecture type for the server.

fileSystemType.description: File system type for the server.

networkInfoList.description: Networking information related to a server.

osInfo.description: Operating system corresponding to a server.

type.description: Information about the type of operating system.

version.description: Information about the version of operating system.

id.description: The ID of the recommendation report generation task.

applicationComponentDetail.description: Detailed information about an application component.

associatedApplications.description: The associated application group as defined in AWS Application Discovery Service.

associatedServerIds.description: A list of the IDs of the servers on which the application component is running.

moreApplicationResource.description: Set to true if the application component belongs to more than one application group.

id.description: ID of the application as defined in Application Discovery Service.

name.description: Name of the application as defined in Application Discovery Service.

applicationComponentStrategies.description: A list of application component strategy recommendations.

isPreferred.description: Set to true if the recommendation is set as preferred.

recommendation.description: Strategy recommendation for the application component.

possible_values: Amazon Relational Database Service on MySQL
Amazon Relational Database Service on PostgreSQL

transformationTool.description: The target destination for the recommendation set.

status.description: The recommendation status of a strategy for an application component.

id.description: The ID for the specific assessment task.

completionTime.description: The time that the import task completed.

id.description: The import file task id returned in the response of StartImportFileTask.

importName.description: The name of the import task given in StartImportFileTask.

inputS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where import file is located.

inputS3Key.description: The Amazon S3 key name of the import file.

numberOfRecordsFailed.description: The number of records that failed to be imported.

numberOfRecordsSuccess.description: The number of records successfully imported.

startTime.description: Start time of the import task.

statusReportS3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket name for status report of import task.

statusReportS3Key.description: The Amazon S3 key name for status report of import task. The report contains details about whether each record imported successfully or why it did not.

id.description: The ID of the recommendation report generation task. See the response of StartRecommendationReportGeneration.

recommendationReportDetails.description: Detailed information about the recommendation report.

completionTime.description: The time that the recommendation report generation task completes.

s3Bucket.description: The S3 bucket where the report file is located.

s3Keys.description: The Amazon S3 key name of the report file.

startTime.description: The time that the recommendation report generation task starts.

status.description: The status of the recommendation report generation task.

statusMessage.description: The status message for recommendation report generation.

associatedApplications.description: The associated application group the server belongs to, as defined in AWS Application Discovery Service.

nextToken.description: The token you use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

id.description: ID of the application as defined in Application Discovery Service.

name.description: Name of the application as defined in Application Discovery Service.

serverStrategies.description: A list of strategy recommendations for the server.

isPreferred.description: Set to true if the recommendation is set as preferred.

numberOfApplicationComponents.description: The number of application components with this strategy recommendation running on the server.

Amazon Relational Database Service on PostgreSQL

transformationTool.description: The target destination for the recommendation set.

status.description: The recommendation status of the strategy for the server.
